858 CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD A2123 Current Reconciled Medication List - Ptnt/Fam/Care CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether, at the time of discharge, the current facility provided the resident’s current reconciled medication list to the resident, family and/or caregiver. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
